markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve content review bottlenecks to accelerate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PMMs are the primary bottleneck,** hesitant to attach their names to articles they haven't reviewed due to quality concerns. This blocks the planned "Arabite process" of auto-publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [**DevRel and SAs will be engaged to unblock reviews.** Fung-Lin will ask Kyle (DevRel lead) to have his team assist, leveraging their technical expertise to accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [**A new content priority is competitive comparison articles** (e.g., "Top 12 Vector Databases"). These articles drive higher conversion and address a key SEO gap, as Redis currently doesn't rank for terms where competitors like Pinecone appear.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**9 new articles are now live,** bringing the total to 15. This provides the first meaningful data set to analyze which topic clusters are attracting traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** PMMs are the primary bottleneck, hesitant to attach their names to articles they haven't reviewed due to quality concerns (e.g., technical inaccuracies, "marketing fluff").](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [**Impact:** This blocks the planned "Arabite process" of auto-publishing content that meets a quality threshold, preventing the project from scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Low-Risk Content:** Fung-Lin will ask PMMs to approve skipping brand reviews for article refreshes, as their technical accuracy is already established.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**New Reviewers:** Engage DevRel and SAs to assist with reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
          - [**Rationale:** More reviewers → faster cycle times.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Their technical expertise is a better match for the content's audience.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
          - [**Rationale:** SAs are particularly well-suited for competitive content.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### New Content Strategy: Competitive Comparisons

  - [**Opportunity:** Shift focus to bottom-funnel, competitive comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [**Performance:** Historically drive higher conversion rates (e.g., free signups).](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [**SEO:** Address a key gap where competitors like Pinecone rank for terms like "top vector databases" and Redis does not.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
      - [**Expertise:** SAs are ideal contributors, leveraging their deal-level knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### Content Performance & Process

  - [**Published:** 9 new articles are live, bringing the total to 15.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [**Significance:** This provides the first meaningful data set to analyze which topic clusters are attracting traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**In Review:** 5 new articles are with PMMs.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**Process Improvement:** GrowthX used Perplexity/ChatGPT for a pre-review check to catch technical inaccuracies, aiming to reduce the PMM feedback burden.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Airtable Sync:** Erik corrected the Airtable "Published Blogs" view, which was outdated.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fung-Lin:**](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Assign the 5 new articles for PMM review by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Ask PMMs to approve skipping brand reviews for article refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Engage Kyle (DevRel lead) to secure DevRel team support for reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Prioritize competitive comparison articles for the next content queue.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Prepare for the Jan 28 PMM feedback session by pulling specific articles for discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Redis Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
      - [Share Q1/Q2 priorities and global campaign details at the next meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/jdRSGjkMVzHyV2VQbM6yMDrBTHoqF3X5?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
